page_metadata.biotools__summary: sgRNACNN is a deep learning-based method for sgRNA on-target activity prediction. It is for identifying sgRNA on-target activity in four crops using ensembles of convolutional neural networks.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: sgRNACNN is a deep learning-based method for sgRNA on-target activity prediction. It is for identifying sgRNA on-target activity in four crops using ensembles of convolutional neural networks.
